And so like you see how to do it, you just have to be moderately, not even like super creative, just like moderately creative in the sense of, okay, what can I offer these people? Because the bottom line is this, offers equal money, that's it, right? The more offers you send to your list, the more stuff you're going to sell. People like buying things, so they're not getting on your list because they don't wanna solve the problem you have. So as long as the stuff you're selling them helps them advance on their road to no longer having the problem that they've got, then you really need to be doing everything you can to continually be selling them stuff.
